utility_evaluation.REASONING:
Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all 5 top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details:
- health_coverage: The format requires "physical and mental health insurance with costs." Plan provides named physical and mental packages and an estimated combined cost. This is sufficiently specified.
- property_coverage: The format requires "home/contents insurance with costs." Plan provides home/contents coverage description and an estimated cost. This is sufficiently specified.
- travel_coverage: The format requires "travel insurance with costs." Plan provides a plan name and estimated cost. This is sufficiently specified.
- additional_services: The format requires "any enhancement services with costs." Plan lists executive services and adult transition services with an estimated cost. This is sufficiently specified.
- total_budget: The format requires "complete monthly/annual cost breakdown." Plan provides monthly and annual totals. This is sufficiently specified.
All 5 items are present and include the necessary details with costs.

Additional services reference Premium Insurance Membership and Enhanced Executive Insurance Concierge, but only Premium Insurance Membership exists in ground truth general services. Therefore, map the items that exactly match ground-truth names: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (mental health), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel insurance), InsurePlus Standard Plan (as adult plan reference under health), and Premium Insurance Membership.
